General.Name: Thelloy Development Group Ltd
General.Description: Thelloy Development Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides property construction services primarily in Hong Kong. The company offers building construction services; repair, maintenance, alteration, and addition work services; and design and build services, as well as invests in properties. It serves government, quasi-government organizations, universities, schools, institutions, and incorporated owners of private buildings. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong. Thelloy Development Group Limited is a subsidiary of Cheers Mate Holding Limited.
General.Address: The Globe, Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong
